name: Instruction Following
description: 15 tests evaluating how precisely models follow complex, multi-part instructions

tests.prompt: List exactly 5 programming languages. For each, provide: (1) year created, (2) primary use case, (3) one famous program written in it. Format as a numbered list.
Respond ONLY with a JSON object (no markdown, no explanation) with these exact fields: name (string), version (number), features (array of 3 strings), active (boolean). Use 'MyApp' as the name.

Write a recipe for chocolate cake. Requirements: (1) Title in ALL CAPS, (2) ingredients as a bulleted list using dashes, (3) instructions numbered, (4) each instruction under 15 words, (5) end with 'Serves: 8-10'.
Translate 'Good morning, how are you today?' into French, Spanish, and Japanese. Present in a table with columns: Language | Translation | Pronunciation guide.

Describe the water cycle. Use EXACTLY 4 paragraphs. Paragraph 1: evaporation. Paragraph 2: condensation. Paragraph 3: precipitation. Paragraph 4: collection. Each paragraph must start with the stage name in bold.
expected_criteria: each starts with bold stage name

tests.prompt: Write a function signature (not implementation) for a REST API. Include: endpoint path, HTTP method, request body schema, response schema, and possible error codes. Use TypeScript types.

Give me a daily schedule for a software developer. IMPORTANT: Do not include any meetings. Hours must use 24h format. Each time slot must have: time, activity, duration in minutes. Cover 9:00 to 18:00.
Explain quantum entanglement. Constraints: (1) max 150 words, (2) must include an analogy, (3) no equations, (4) must mention Einstein, (5) end with a question for the reader.
Create a mock CLI help text for a tool called 'datapipe'. Include: description, usage pattern, at least 5 flags with descriptions, and 3 example commands. Follow standard Unix man page conventions.

Write a professional email declining a job offer. Requirements: formal tone, express genuine appreciation, briefly mention reason (other opportunity), leave door open for future, subject line included, max 150 words.

Generate a markdown document with the following exact structure: # Title (use 'Project Spec'), ## Overview (2 sentences), ## Requirements (numbered list, 4 items), ## Timeline (table with Phase, Duration, Owner columns), ## Risks (3 bullet points).
Rewrite this sentence in 5 different tones: 'The project is delayed.' Tones needed: (1) formal/corporate, (2) apologetic, (3) optimistic, (4) technical/passive, (5) humorous. Label each clearly.
List 10 countries. After each country name, add: (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code), capital city, and one fact. Format: [Number]. [Country] ([Code]) - [Capital] - [Fact]. No markdown, plain text only.

Write a commit message following the Conventional Commits specification for: adding dark mode support that includes a new CSS variable system, updating 3 component files, and fixing a bug where toggle state wasn't persisted.

Create a fictional product spec with EXACTLY these sections in this order: 1) Problem Statement, 2) Target Users (persona format), 3) Core Features (max 5), 4) Success Metrics (must be measurable), 5) Out of Scope. Product: an AI-powered recipe app.
